message:
feat(server): artifact-graph traceability, policy bundles, and effect plans for ATC

ATC engine (atc.rs):
- Add stable FNV-1a hashing for deterministic trace/claim/evidence IDs
- Extend AtcDecisionRecord with claim_id, evidence_id, trace_id,
  decision_class, policy_id, loss_table, and fallback_reason fields
- Add AtcLossTableEntry for per-action expected-loss visibility
- Introduce AtcEffectPlan for structured effect emission (advisories,
  releases, probes) with full provenance chain back to decisions
- Add EventDecisionBuilder for deterministic event-style decisions
  not backed by a single DecisionCore
- Introduce AtcLivenessPolicyBundle with schema versioning, artifact
  hashing, bundle-level integrity validation, and disk loading
- Add AtcConfig.policy_bundle_path for policy-as-data execution
- Track budget debt in slow controller with debt-ratio-based mode
  transitions and debt-based probe limiting
- Cache sorted agent names for deterministic summary rendering
- Normalize deadlock cycles for stable output ordering
- Factor out effective_threshold() as static method, use
  current_adaptive_threshold_k() helper to avoid snapshot cloning
- Wire project_key through register_agent/observe_activity for
  effect routing back into Agent Mail
- Emit recent_decisions in summary snapshots (last 16)

Server (lib.rs):
- Thread project_key through agent registration and activity signals
- Wire AtcEffectPlan into tick report handling and summary exposure
- Add effect plan fields to ATC telemetry and summary endpoints
- Extend kernel telemetry with next_due_micros, pending_effects,
  lock_wait_micros
- Extend budget telemetry with budget_debt_micros and kernel_total_micros
- Extend policy telemetry with bundle_id, bundle_hash, artifact hashes,
  and decision_mode

TUI (system_health.rs):
- Add new ATC telemetry fields to system health dashboard rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+        lines.push(Line::from_spans([

+                value_style,
+            ),
+            Span::styled(
+                format!(
+                    "  shadow={}  disagreements={}",

+                ),
+                hint_style,
+            ),
+        ]));
+        if let Some(decision) = snap.atc.recent_decisions.first() {
+            lines.push(Line::from_spans([

+                        decision.decision_class,
+                        decision.action,
+                        decision.claim_id
+                    ),
+                    value_style,
+                ),
+            ]));
+        }
+        if let Some(execution) = snap.atc.recent_executions.last() {
+            lines.push(Line::from_spans([
+                Span::styled("Execution: ", label_style),
+                Span::styled(

+                    ),
+                    value_style,
+                ),
+                Span::styled(format!("  effect={}", execution.effect_id), hint_style),
+            ]));
+        }

+    if out.atc.budget.budget_debt_micros > 0 {
+        out.lines.push(ProbeLine {
+            level: Level::Warn,
+            name: "atc-budget-debt",
+            detail: format!(
+                "ATC budget debt is {}us with executor backlog {}",
+                out.atc.budget.budget_debt_micros, out.atc.executor_pending_effects
+            ),
+            remediation: Some(
+                "Reduce ATC work per tick or clear the executor backlog before widening automation."
+                    .into(),
+            ),
+        });
+    }
+
+    if out.atc.executor_pending_effects > 0 {
+        out.lines.push(ProbeLine {
+            level: Level::Warn,
+            name: "atc-executor-backlog",
+            detail: format!(
+                "ATC executor has {} pending effect(s) in {} mode",
+                out.atc.executor_pending_effects, out.atc.executor_mode
+            ),
+            remediation: Some(
+                "Inspect ATC recent executions and downstream tool health before enabling broader effect execution."
+                    .into(),
+            ),
+        });
+    }
+
     if out.atc.policy.shadow_enabled && out.atc.policy.shadow_disagreements > 0 {
         out.lines.push(ProbeLine {
             level: Level::Warn,
@@ -1726,6 +1836,27 @@ fn add_atc_findings(out: &mut DiagnosticsSnapshot) {
         });
     }
 
+    if let Some(execution) = out.atc.recent_executions.last() {
+        let failed = matches!(
+            execution.status.as_str(),
+            "missing_project" | "executor_unavailable"
+        ) || execution.status.starts_with("failed:");
+        if failed {
+            out.lines.push(ProbeLine {
+                level: Level::Fail,
+                name: "atc-executor",
+                detail: format!(
+                    "ATC effect execution failed for {} {} ({})",
+                    execution.agent, execution.kind, execution.status
+                ),
+                remediation: Some(
+                    "Inspect project registration, executor mode, and downstream tool errors before trusting live ATC effects."
+                        .into(),
+                ),
+            });
+        }
+    }
+
     for agent in out
         .atc
         .tracked_agents
